allow: Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc 'cd "/home/iman/Merket Weekly/server" && exec node src/index.js')

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/api/infrastructure-pressure' -TimeoutSec 60; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.indicators | ForEach-Object { if \($_.error\) { Write-Output "[$\($_.id\)] ERROR: $\($_.error\)" } else { Write-Output "[$\($_.id\)] $\($_.title\): $\($_.valueDisplay\) / $\($_.percentileDisplay\)" } })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/src/App.jsx' -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content -match 'useTheme' -and $r.Content -match 'theme-toggle'\) { Write-Output "HMR picked up theme toggle ✓" } else { Write-Output "App.jsx served but theme markers not found" })
